description: Monotype provides font technology, font licensing, and enterprise font-management products, including the Monotype Fonts platform and MyFonts marketplace. Its services help organizations discover, manage, and integrate typefaces into digital products and workflows.
summary: Monotype exposes a REST-based Fonts API at `https://api.monotype.com/v1` authenticated with OAuth 2.0 access tokens, plus a public MyFonts MCP endpoint at `https://fontgpt-chatgpt.monotype.com/mcp`.
